title: Siddaramaiah resigns: From tending cattle to Karnataka’s longest-serving CM — a four-decade political journey
description: Siddaramaiah resigns: Siddaramaiah is Karnataka’s longest-serving CM. Siddaramaiah, who is also the only CM after Urs to complete five years, was in the office for 1,829 days in his first term from 13 May 2013 to 15 May 2018.
